description_long: This is a medium-sized, irregularly shaped rock with a rough, uneven surface and a predominantly beige coloration interspersed with dark mineral flecks. The rock displays a variety of textures, with some areas appearing smoother and others more jagged or pitted. One side of the rock features a visible marking or label, suggesting it may have been cataloged or identified for study or urban use. The coloration ranges from light tan to darker brown and black, with the mineral inclusions giving it a speckled appearance. The rock's form is somewhat flattened, making it less likely to roll and more stable when placed on the ground. Its overall appearance suggests it could serve as a natural obstacle or decorative element in an urban environment such as a park or landscaped area.
description: A beige, irregularly shaped rock with dark mineral flecks and a rough, speckled surface, featuring a visible marking on one side.
description_view_0: This view shows the rock's rough, undulating surface with a visible white marking or label on one side.
description_view_1: Here, the rock's flat, speckled face is prominent, highlighting the dark mineral inclusions against the lighter background.
description_view_2: This angle emphasizes the broad, flat surface with scattered dark spots and a generally rectangular outline.
description_view_3: The rock appears more elongated and tapers at one end, with a mix of smooth and rough textures visible.
attribute_location: urban park or landscaped sidewalk edge
